description: Central vendor/supplier database. Stores contact info, contract pricing by SKU, payment terms, insurance/certification tracking, and performance scores. Referenced by Purchase Orders, Invoices, Contracts, and Deliveries. Maps to Blueprint sections 5B (Vendor Sourcing), 5G (Vendor Relationship), and 5I (Compliance).

fields.name: Vendor ID
fields.description: Unique vendor identifier (e.g., VND-001). Auto-generated on creation.

fields.name: Vendor Name
fields.description: Legal business name of the vendor/supplier.

fields.name: DBA Name
fields.description: Doing-business-as name if different from legal name.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current vendor approval status. Only 'Approved' vendors can receive POs.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: Product/service categories this vendor supplies.

fields.name: Primary Contact Name
fields.description: Name of the primary sales or account representative.

fields.name: Primary Contact Email
fields.description: Email address for orders and general communication.

fields.name: Primary Contact Phone
fields.description: Phone number for the primary contact.

fields.name: Orders Email
fields.description: Dedicated email for receiving POs (may differ from contact email). Used by n8n workflow to transmit POs.

fields.name: AP Email
fields.description: Email for accounts payable inquiries and invoice disputes.

fields.name: Phone
fields.description: Main business phone. Used by ElevenLabs voice agent for vendor calls (Blueprint 5B).

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Full mailing/business address.

fields.name: Website
fields.description: Vendor website URL.

fields.name: Vendor Portal URL
fields.description: URL for vendor's online ordering portal, if available. n8n can submit orders via API for vendors with portal systems (Blueprint 5C).

fields.name: Has Portal API
fields.description: Whether this vendor supports API-based ordering (Sysco, US Foods, etc.). Determines if POs are sent via API or email.

fields.name: Prefers Phone
fields.description: Vendor prefers phone over email for orders/quotes. Triggers ElevenLabs voice agent instead of email (Blueprint 5B).

fields.name: Payment Terms
fields.description: Standard payment terms for this vendor.

fields.name: Minimum Order Amount
fields.description: Minimum dollar amount per order required by this vendor.

fields.name: Lead Time Days
fields.description: Standard delivery lead time in business days. Used by demand forecasting to determine when to place orders (Blueprint 5A Step 4).

fields.name: Delivery Schedule
fields.description: Regular delivery days (e.g., 'Mon, Wed, Fri'). Helps n8n time auto-PO generation.

fields.name: Contract Pricing
fields.description: JSON array of contracted prices by SKU. Cross-referenced by n8n for price verification (Blueprint 5B). Format: [{"sku": "CHK-BRS-001", "description": "Chicken Breast 50lb", "unit_price": 3.85, "uom": "lb", "effective_date": "2026-01-01", "expiry_date": "2026-12-31"}]

fields.name: Price Tolerance Pct
fields.description: Allowable price variance percentage before auto-dispute email is generated. Default 2% per Blueprint 5B.

fields.name: Tax ID / EIN
fields.description: Federal Tax ID / EIN for 1099 reporting (Blueprint 5I). Exported year-end for AP.

fields.name: W9 On File
fields.description: Whether a current W-9 form has been received. Part of vendor onboarding workflow (Blueprint 5G).

fields.name: W9 Document
fields.description: Uploaded W-9 form document.

fields.name: Insurance Certificate On File
fields.description: Whether current liability insurance certificate is on file.

fields.name: Insurance Expiry Date
fields.description: Expiration date of the vendor's liability insurance certificate. n8n sends reminders when approaching expiry (Blueprint 5I).

fields.name: Insurance Document
fields.description: Uploaded insurance certificate document.

fields.name: Food Safety Cert On File
fields.description: Whether a current food safety certification is on file (required for F&B vendors).

fields.name: Food Safety Cert Expiry
fields.description: Expiration date of food safety certification. Automated reminders at 90/60/30 days.

fields.name: Food Safety Cert Document
fields.description: Uploaded food safety certification document.

fields.name: Business License Expiry
fields.description: Expiration date of vendor's business license.

fields.name: Onboarding Status
fields.description: Tracks progress through the vendor onboarding workflow (Blueprint 5G).

fields.name: Performance Score
fields.description: Overall vendor performance score (1-10 scale). Calculated monthly by Claude from delivery, accuracy, quality, pricing, and responsiveness data (Blueprint 5B, 5G).

fields.name: On-Time Delivery Rate
fields.description: Percentage of deliveries arriving on time. Aggregated from Deliveries table.

fields.name: Order Accuracy Rate
fields.description: Percentage of orders delivered without quantity or item discrepancies.

fields.name: Quality Complaint Count
fields.description: Number of quality complaints in the current scoring period.

fields.name: Pricing Consistency Score
fields.description: How consistently the vendor honors contracted pricing (1-10).

fields.name: Responsiveness Score
fields.description: How quickly vendor responds to inquiries and quotes (1-10).

fields.name: Last Scorecard Date
fields.description: Date of the most recent monthly vendor scorecard generation.

fields.name: Contracts
fields.description: Link to all contracts with this vendor.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.description: Link to all purchase orders placed with this vendor.

fields.name: Invoices
fields.description: Link to all invoices received from this vendor.

fields.name: Deliveries
fields.description: Link to all deliveries from this vendor.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this vendor (relationship history, special terms, etc.).

fields.name: Created Date
fields.description: Date the vendor record was created.

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.description: Date the vendor record was last updated.

views.name: Approved Vendors
views.description: Filtered to show only approved vendors.

views.name: Expiring Certifications
views.description: Vendors with insurance or food safety certs expiring within 90 days. Used by n8n contract expiry monitoring.
views.filter: Insurance Expiry Date or Food Safety Cert Expiry within next 90 days

views.name: Performance Rankings
views.description: Sorted by Performance Score descending. Used for monthly scorecard review.
